itinerary.title: Arrival & Seminyak Beach Leisure
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bali and transfer to Seminyak, a sophisticated beach area. Check into your hotel, relax on Seminyak Beach, and explore the boutiques and restaurants.

itinerary.title: Ubud Culture, Monkey Forest & Rice Terraces
itinerary.description: Visit Ubud, the cultural heart of Bali. Explore the sacred Monkey Forest, walk through the picturesque Tegalalang Rice Terraces, and shop for souvenirs at the Ubud Art Market.

itinerary.title: Mount Batur Sunrise Trek & Tirta Empul Temple
itinerary.description: Begin early for a sunrise trek up Mount Batur for panoramic views. Later, experience Bali's spiritual side at Tirta Empul Temple, famous for its holy spring water purification rituals.

itinerary.title: Tanah Lot & Uluwatu Cliff Temple Sunsets
itinerary.description: Visit the iconic offshore Tanah Lot Temple. In the afternoon, head to Uluwatu Temple, perched on a cliff overlooking the Indian Ocean, and watch the traditional sunset Kecak dance.

itinerary.title: Bali Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy a free morning in Bali before checking out and transferring to the airport for your flight home.

title: Bali: Bliss & Island Magic
description: Discover the spiritual serenity and natural wonders of the 'Island of the Gods'. Explore the artistic villages, green valleys, and Sacred Monkey Forest of Ubud, and walk along the cliffs of Uluwatu to watch a traditional fire dance at sunset. Hike the active Mount Batur volcano at sunrise, participate in a purification ritual at Tirta Empul's holy springs, and unwind on the pristine beaches of Seminyak, surrounded by luxury and peace.
highlights: Watch the legendary Kecak fire dance at the cliffside Uluwatu Temple at sunset
Explore Ubud's lush Tegalalang Rice Terraces and Sacred Monkey Forest
Visit the famous offshore Tanah Lot Temple for breathtaking coastal views
Unwind along Seminyak's beautiful beaches, boutique shops, and dining hubs
Trek up Mount Batur at sunrise for panoramic views of Bali's volcanic caldera
Participate in spiritual purification rituals at Tirta Empul Holy Spring
